department.name: Computer Science and Engineering
department.university: Jatiya Kabi Kazi Nazrul Islam University

phd_program.note: PhD program is currently offered by the department.

department.description: The department of Computer Science and Engineering is dedicated to providing quality education through a committed faculty team. It plays a significant role in developing the ICT backbone of the nation. Our graduates serve the nation with reputation.
department.head_message: Jatiya Kabi Kazi Nazrul Islam University was established by the Government of Bangladesh on 01 March 2005. The academic program started on 03 June 2007 with four departments under two faculties. The department of Computer Science and Engineering is one of them. The development of society greatly depends on technological improvement.

teachers_list.name: Professor Dr. A. H. M. Kamal
Professor Dr. Md. Sujan Ali (Sheikh Sujan Ali)
